rationale: PR is broader than the title suggests but the diff is honest. The titled change (docs/plans/2026-05-24-periscope-l4-integration-plan.md replacing 10 instances of `~/Documents/Terminal\ xCode/claude/OpenClaw/...` with `$OPENCLAW_ROOT/...`) is delivered cleanly, including the orama-system path line and all step-4/5 shell snippets that grep/ls/cd into OpenClaw. docs/LESSONS.md gets a new dated entry documenting the CI repo_hygiene.py scan rationale and the $OPENCLAW_ROOT convention decision. The broader additions (CLAUDE.md §9 'Parallel Agents & Git Worktrees' section, new docs/v2/19-worktree-parallel-agents.md, docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-24-worktree-parallel-agents-design.md, scripts/worktree-bootstrap.sh, .experience-log/dogfood-notes.md) are all documentation/script additions on a separate concern — described in the body as 'records the hygiene lesson for future docs' which is an understatement but not deceptive given the diff is all .md files plus one bash script. No tests changed, no code logic, no swallowed errors, no hallucinated dependencies. Pure docs + workflow-tooling PR.
